item.title: Palantir posts mini-manifesto denouncing inclusivity and ‘regressive’ cultures
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch AI
Published: 2026-04-19
Palantir's ideological bent has come under more scrutiny as it's worked with ICE and positioned itself as a defender of "the West."

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Uber enters its assetmaxxing era
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch AI
Published: 2026-04-19
Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

item.title: Tesla brings its robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch AI
Published: 2026-04-18
The company now offers robotaxi service in three cities, all of them in Texas, after launching in Austin last year and starting to offer rides without safety drivers in January 2026.

item.title: AI chip startup Cerebras files for IPO
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch AI
Published: 2026-04-18
In recent months, the company announced an agreement with Amazon Web Services to use Cerebras chips in Amazon data centers, as well as a deal with OpenAI reportedly worth more than $10 billion.

item.title: 尝试 Gemini CLI 替代 Claude，Jeecg skills 基本通畅，但遇致命问题
item.description:
Source: 开源中国 AI 资讯
Published: 2026-04-19
AI Agent 使用体验 | JeecgBoot 团队将日常 Claude Code 工作流迁移到 Gemini CLI 的阶段性总结 为什么要换 Gemini CLI JeecgBoot 低代码团队平时主力用 Claude Code 做代码生成、文档写作、重构脚本。但 Claude 最近实名认证 + 频繁封号的事闹得人心惶惶 —— 身边已经有好几个账号莫名其妙被风控，工作流一断就是一整天...
